commit_message: [VAL] fixing the verif fail tests for the incorrect sig indexing [VAL] fixing the verif fail tests for the incorrect sig indexing The 1157th d-word has 3 bytes but the fail_bit is randomized from 0 to 31 where the error might be injected to the non-used byte of the d-word. Therefore, RTL does not fail but test expects a signature verification failure.
